rules.name: Mechanized Infantry
rules.description: Infantry units gain a 5+ Cover Save the Turn they Disembark from a Transport. Forced Disembark does not provide this Save.

rules.name: Hive City Inhabitants
rules.description: All Infantry suffer -1 cover save if it is not provided by a building, fortified terrain piece, or Mechanized Infantry.

rules.name: No Place to Call Home
rules.description: each model only counts as half a model for the purpose of Contesting Objectives.

rules.name: Carbines
rules.description: All Lasguns and Hotshot Lasguns are R-6.

rules.name: Catachan Fangs
rules.description: All Infantry and Monstrous Infantry gain the following weapon: Catachan Fang RMelee S+1 AP- Rules None.

rules.name: Flak Vests
rules.description: All Infantry and Monstrous Infantry Datasheets are Sv+1, resulting in 1 worse Armour Save except unique characters. Page 4 of 123 Jungle Grit: All T3 Infantry gain T+1. Models with Bold already have this baked into their profile.

rules.name: Trenching Tools
rules.description: All Infantry and Monstrous Infantry gain the following Weapon Profile; Range: Melee, S: User, AP: -, Rules: Extra Attack 1.

rules.name: Command Dependent
rules.description: All models gain Stubborn, but may only perform the following actions when a HQ or Advisor Slot is within 12”; Move, Advance, Charge.

rules.name: Lucius Pattern
rules.description: All Lasguns use the following Weapon Profile instead of the standard Lasgun profile; Range: 24, S: 4, AP: -, Rules: Assault 1.

rules.name: Airbourne Specialists
rules.description: All non-Vehicle models gain the Deepstrike rule. If the model already has Deepstrike, it may reroll Deepstrike scatter dice.

rules.name: Paratrooper Loadout
rules.description: each model only counts as half a model for contesting objectives.

rules.name: Skyborne Division
rules.description: every model with Deepstrike or Outflank must be held in reserve during army deployment.

rules.name: Air Superiority
rules.description: Lose all Heavy Support Slots and gain +1 Flyer Slot. They may not take any Lord of War that does not have High Altitude.

rules.name: Accatran Pattern Lasgun
rules.description: All Lasguns are replaced with the following Weapon Profile; Range: 12, S: 3, AP: -, Rules: Assault 2.

rules.name: Hive City Inhabitants
rules.description: All models suffer -1 Cover Save unless it is being provided by a Building or Fortified Terrain Piece.

rules.name: Command Dependent
rules.description: All models gain Stubborn, but may only perform the following actions when a HQ or Advisor Slot is within 12”; Move, Advance, Charge.

rules.name: Crowd Control
rules.description: All models Overwatch on a 5+. Pistols Overwatch on a 4+. Other instances of Snap Shots are still performed on a 6+.

rules.name: Triplex Pattern Lasgun
rules.description: All Lasguns have the following option Weapon Profile in addition to the standard Lasgun profile; Range: 12, S:5, AP: -, Rules: Heavy 1, Gets Hot! PDF (Planetary Defense Force):

rules.name: Command Dependent
rules.description: All models gain Stubborn, but may only perform the following actions when a HQ or Advisor Slot is within 12”; Move, Advance, Charge.

rules.name: Like the Wind
rules.description: All non-vehicle models gain Stealth. Models already with Stealth gain Shroud.

rules.name: Desert Specialists
rules.description: All nonvehicle Sv Stats are Sv -.

rules.name: Strike and Fade
rules.description: All models automatically lose Combat Resolution.

rules.name: Camo Cloaks
rules.description: All Infantry models gain Stealth. This does not affect Monstrous Infantry. Page 5 of 123 Stealth Armour: All Infantry Datasheets are Sv+1, resulting in 1 worse Armour Save. This does not affect Monstrous Infantry or unique characters.

rules.name: No Place to Call Home
rules.description: each model only counts as half a model for contesting objectives.

rules.name: Command Dependent
rules.description: All models gain Stubborn, but may only perform the following actions when a HQ or Advisor Slot is within 12”; Move, Advance, Charge.

rules.name: Poorly Equipped
rules.description: All Infantry and Monstrous Infantry models Sv Stats are Sv -. This does not affect unique characters.

rules.name: Acceptable Losses
rules.description: Any unit may choose to test Ld to shoot into close combat with friendly models involved. If passed, they may place Flame and Blast templates over friendly models this turn. All natural rolls of a 1 to hit automatically hit a friendly unit at random involved in the melee, chosen by the owner how to allocate the wounds and saves like normal. Templates Hit all models underneath them like normal.

rules.name: Family Heirlooms
rules.description: All Infantry Sv Stats are Sv 4+.

rules.name: Sins of the Forefathers
rules.description: All models suffer -1 Ld.

rules.name: Kantrael Pattern Lasguns
rules.description: Replace all Lasguns profiles with the following Weapon Profile; Range: 30, S: 3, AP: -, Rules: Heavy 2

rules.name: A Life of Servitude
rules.description: each model only counts as half a model for contesting objectives. Page 6 of 123
